name: popover
label: Popover
description: A teleported floating panel that follows its trigger on scroll and resize. The same engine that powers the dropdown, with full control over placement.

props.name: position
props.description: Which side of the trigger the popover opens on.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment of the popover relative to the trigger.

props.name: gap
props.description: Spacing between trigger and popover (Tailwind spacing units).

props.name: animate
props.description: Scale + fade the panel open from the corner nearest the trigger. Set false for a plain fade.

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: The clickable element that opens the popover.
